summary: The diff successfully implements both requirements: REQ-12 (burgundy and white color scheme) and REQ-13 (Google Maps location section). The color scheme changes are comprehensive across all components, CSS variables, and Tailwind configuration. A new LocationMap component was added with proper Google Maps embed, though the iframe src uses a generic embed URL rather than the exact share link provided in the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Generic Google Maps embed URL instead of the specified share link
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 specifies using the URL https://maps.app.goo.gl/7vmjBD4RjaFTk1gY8, but LocationMap.tsx implements a generic Google Maps embed with placeholder coordinates (pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3597.123456789!2d-98.123456!3d25.654321). The requirement explicitly states 'Map uses the provided Google Maps URL: https://maps.app.goo.gl/7vmjBD4RjaFTk1gY8' as an acceptance criterion.
